title: Woking Borough Council: Ministerial response to Commissioners’ fourth report
body: "Copy of the letter from Baroness Taylor of Stevenage, Parliamentary Under-Secretary of State, to the Woking Commissioners in response to their fourth report. The Minister is reassured by Commissioners’ comments that the Council is committed to achieving the objectives that the Council have worked with Commissioners to set, which will radically overhaul the operation of the Council. "
